title: PDCBVC rule BR-009
embedding_text: PDCBVC business rule BR-009 in scope BROWSE-FASE2. If (NOT (EIBAID = DFHENTER) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF1) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF2) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF3) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF4) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF9) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF7) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF8)) then JUMP -> BROWSE-FASE2-TASTOER. Category=control. Kind=ui. Severity=neutral.

content.condition: (NOT (EIBAID = DFHENTER) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF1) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF2) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF3) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF4) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF9) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF7) OR (EIBAID = DFHPF8))
